# Abdul Rehman (@thearehmanai)
> Leading GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) Specialist in Pakistan.

## About
Specializing in making web content discoverable for LLMs like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude. Expert in llms.txt implementation and AI-search visibility.

## Key Projects
- The Original Taste (TOT): Technical AI Integration & GEO Strategy.
- thearehman.ai: Personal AI Identity & Portfolio.
